allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('height:', d.get\('block_height', d.get\('height'\)\)\); print\('hash:', d.get\('block_hash', d.get\('block_info',{}\).get\('block_hash', d.get\('hash'\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); h=d.get\('header',{}\); m=h.get\('metadata',{}\); print\('Metadata:', m\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); txs=d.get\('transactions',[]\); print\('Block height:', d.get\('header',{}\).get\('metadata',{}\).get\('height'\)\); print\('Num transactions:', len\(txs\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); txs=d.get\('transactions',[]\); print\('Block 123456 - txs:', len\(txs\)\); [print\('TX:', t.get\('id', t.get\('transaction_id'\)\), 'program:', t.get\('program_id', [p.get\('program'\) for p in t.get\('transitions',[]\)]]\)\) for t in txs]")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); txs=d.get\('transactions',[]\); [print\('TX ID:', t.get\('id'\), 'Transitions:', [\(tr.get\('program'\), tr.get\('function_name'\)\) for tr in t.get\('transitions',[]\)]\) for t in txs]")
